name: pronounce
description: Hover any tech word — hear how it's actually pronounced. 918-entry sourced dictionary. Cross-platform: macOS `say`, Linux `espeak-ng`, Windows PowerShell. Works in VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, VSCodium, Zed.

commands.title: Pronounce: Show welcome / how to use

pronounce.voice.description: macOS `say` voice. Run `say -v '?'` for full list. Recommended: Samantha, Daniel, Karen, Moira, Tessa.

pronounce.rate.description: Speech rate in words per minute.

pronounce.repetitions.description: Times to repeat the word. CLI default is 3; hover is more annoying when repeated, so default here is 1.

pronounce.hoverEnabled.description: Show pronunciation popup on hover for known tech words.

pronounce.hoverOnlyKnownWords.description: Only show hover for words in the dictionary. Disable to also hover unknown words (uses TTS letter-to-sound, lower quality).

pronounce.statusBar.description: Show a 🔊 Pronounce item in the status bar (click to speak the current selection).

walkthroughs.title: Welcome to Pronounce
walkthroughs.description: Hover any tech word → hear how engineers actually say it. 851 sourced entries. Cross-platform (macOS / Linux / Windows) as of v0.3.

steps.title: Hear it — try kubectl, nginx, or YAML
steps.description:
Run `Pronounce: Speak word` to hear any dictionary entry. The fastest way: highlight a word in any file and press **⌘⇧'** (or run `Pronounce: Speak current selection`).

[Hear `kubectl` now](command:pronounce.speak?%22kubectl%22)

steps.title: Hover any tech word
steps.description:
Hover over `kubectl`, `nginx`, `GIF`, `YAML`, `Ghostty`, `wagmi`, `JSON` etc. in any file — a tooltip shows the IPA, the English-style respelling, the source citation, and a 🔊 Play button. Works in **any** language file.

[Open a sample file](command:pronounce.openWalkthrough)

steps.title: Search all 817 entries
steps.description:
Run `Pronounce: Search dictionary…` from the command palette (⌘⇧P / Ctrl+Shift+P) and fuzzy-find any word.

[Open search now](command:pronounce.search)

steps.title: ★ Star it · keeps the dictionary growing
steps.description:
If Pronounce just saved you one cringey standup moment, **one star is the single best way to keep the dictionary growing** — more devs find it, more PRs land, more entries get creator-clarified.

[★ Star on GitHub](command:pronounce.starOnGitHub)
[Visit pronounce.renlab.ai](command:pronounce.openWebsite)

Optional: [☕ Coffee on Ko-fi](command:pronounce.sponsor) — pays for one new entry per cup.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run build:dict && npm run compile
